description: Illustrative permissioned real-world asset token pattern using v1.3.0 governance metadata.

authority.name: Example Asset Issuer
authority.delegationScope: Defines issuance policy, eligibility policy, and asset verification requirements for this example only.

rightsModel.legalClaim: Reference claim to an off-chain asset held under a documented custody arrangement.
rightsModel.economicRights: Holder receives the economic exposure described in the offering or asset documentation.
rightsModel.redemptionRights: Redemption depends on issuer policy, transfer restrictions, and asset liquidity.
